user.title: UniFi Mobility
user.description: Enter a UniFi Mobility API key with the read:mobility scope. Leave Workspace ID blank to use the first visible workspace.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the UniFi Mobility API.
error.invalid_auth: The API key was rejected or does not include the required scope.
error.no_workspaces: No UniFi Mobility workspaces were returned for this API key.

abort.already_configured: This UniFi Mobility workspace is already configured.
